Class UnmodifiableShortCollection

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.collections.impl.collection.mutable.primitive.AbstractUnmodifiableShortCollection
org.eclipse.collections.impl.collection.mutable.primitive.UnmodifiableShortCollection
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, MutableShortCollection, PrimitiveIterable, ShortIterable
public class UnmodifiableShortCollection extends AbstractUnmodifiableShortCollection
This file was automatically generated from template file unmodifiablePrimitiveCollection.stg.
Since:
4.0.

    newEmpty()
    Creates a new empty mutable version of the same collection type.

    This method will take a MutableShortCollection and wrap it directly in a UnmodifiableShortCollection.
